```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1.2em;align-items:center;">

  <div style="position:relative;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.45em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;">
   <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#5654A2,#3F3D7E);color:#F8F7F0;padding:0.5em 0.9em;border-radius:10px;font-weight:700;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(86,84,162,0.25);">
    ~/.claude/skills/commit/
   </div>
   <div style="color:#9B8EA0;font-size:0.55em;">↓ <em>ln -s</em></div>
   <div style="display:flex;gap:0.3em;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;">
    <div style="background:#FFFFFF;color:#5654A2;padding:0.3em 0.55em;border-radius:6px;border:1.5px dashed #C4C3E8;box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);">project-a/</div>
    <div style="background:#FFFFFF;color:#5654A2;padding:0.3em 0.55em;border-radius:6px;border:1.5px dashed #C4C3E8;box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);">project-b/</div>
    <div style="background:#FFFFFF;color:#5654A2;padding:0.3em 0.55em;border-radius:6px;border:1.5px dashed #C4C3E8;box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);">project-c/</div>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="text-align:left;">
   <div style="font-size:0.85em;color:#2C3E50;line-height:1.4;margin-bottom:0.55em;">
    Claude Code <strong style="color:#5654A2;">follows symlinks transparently</strong>.
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.55;margin-bottom:0.6em;">
    Reads &amp; edits the <strong>target</strong>, not the link.
   </div>
   <ul style="list-style:none;padding:0;margin:0;font-size:0.55em;line-height:1.7;color:#564232;">
    <li>· one canonical copy on disk</li>
    <li>· link from each project</li>
    <li>· update once → all see it</li>
   </ul>
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
